results.title: Abhishek Banerjee seeks time from KMC to respond to demolition notice
results.description: Trinamool Congress leader Abhishek Banerjee has sought time from the Kolkata Municipal Corporation (KMC) to reply to the notice regarding the valuation of his property and the demolition of an illegal part of his house at Bhabanipur.

results.title: Sachin Tendulkar shares heartfelt note for son Arjun after his first IPL 2026 appearance for LSG

results.title: Moment terrified White House reporter dives for cover as gunman opens fire
results.description: A video caught the moment gun shots rang out at the White House as a reporter froze while speaking to the camera and ducked in fear. The gunman was shot dead by police

results.title: India and US Strengthen Ties: Jaishankar Outlines Five Key Principles
results.description: External Affairs Minister S. Jaishankar recently outlined a five-point strategy to enhance India-US relations during discussions with US Secretary of State Marco Rubio. The meeting, held in New Delhi, emphasized the importance of dialogue, maritime commerce, and adherence to international law. Both leaders expressed optimism about finalizing an interim trade agreement and strengthening defense cooperation. Jaishankar's principles aim to address global challenges and foster resilient partnerships, reflecting a commitment to a robust strategic alliance. Rubio echoed this sentiment, highlighting the positive trajectory of India-US relations. Discover more about their discussions and future collaborations.

results.title: 11 test pilots, 6 flight engineers pass out from AFTPS
results.description: Seventeen officers completed a 48-week training program at the Air Force Test Pilots School. The graduating batch included personnel from the Indian Air Force, Army, and Navy. Chief of Air Staff Air Chief Marshal AP Singh presented awards to outstanding performers. The officers will now join the Aircraft and Systems Testing Establishment.

results.title: India, US discuss trade as Rubio cites progress on Iran conflict
results.description: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio held talks with Indian Foreign Minister Subrahmanyam Jaishankar on Saturday, as the two sides discussed trade, visas, maritime security and energy supplies, while Washington cited progress on efforts to resolve the Iran conflict.

results.title: Rajasthan Horror: Husband Slits Wife's Throat, Then Injures Self In Suicide Attempt; CCTV Video Surfaces
results.description: A 30-year-old woman named Kanta was killed by her husband, Nitesh Kumar Jingar, during an argument in Rajasthan’s Balotra district on Saturday. Police said the accused attacked her with a knife near her maternal home in Siwana area, killing her on the spot. After the incident, Nitesh allegedly stabbed himself in the throat and stomach.

results.description: An aspirant in the African Democratic Congress, ADC, gubernatorial primary election in Rivers State, Dr. Allen Idaso Ezekiel-Hart, has rejected the exercise. Ezekiel-Hart described the primary election as a shambolic charade allegedly orchestrated by former Rivers State Governor, Rotimi Amaechi, to impose a preferred candidate. results.title: Video Shows James Harden Playing Zero Defense In Miserable Game 3 Loss
results.description: James Harden is getting crushed online after multiple viral clips from the Cleveland Cavaliers’ brutal Game 3 loss to the New York Knicks appeared to show him giving almost no defensive effort during key stretches of the game.
